translations:
Mṭalle
			tre ǧewərkat d kalbe li dərto, koṯe , koṯe hiye koṯe ko
			misalpxi aǧ ǧewərkat, hak hak: “Hani ǧewərkat ne? Mən
			cewərkat ne?” - “Aǧ ǧewərkat di aṯtayḏux ne.” They
			(two women) brought home two puppies of dog. He (Sultan) comes, he
			comes: The puppies are climbing/jumping (upon him). (He says):
			Omg! Are these puppies? How come these are puppies?’’ – 
			(two women answer): ‘‘These are puppies of your wife?’’
